title: LACA
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.
crs_summary: Local Access to Courts Act or LACA This bill adds College Station to the list of places where court must be held in the Galveston Division of the Southern District of Texas. Additionally, the bill adds El Centro to the list of places where court must be held in the Southern District of California.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.
